entry.title: Introduction
entry.content:
科研成果

Multiple Pseudo-labels by Noise-Aware Network for accurate segmentation of optic disc and cup（CSCWD）

Enhancing Point Annotations with Superpixel and Confidence Learning Guided for Improving Semi-Supervised OCT Fluid Segmentation（BSPC）

MSE-Nets: Multi-annotated Semi-supervised Ensemble Networks for Improving Segmentation of Medical Image with Ambiguous Boundaries（JBHI under review）

教育经历

Markdown链接语法

温州大学

浙江理工大学

杭州电子科技大学丽水研究院
